evidence.observed: P95 latency exceeded 10s due to 20k+ prompt tokens per request.

findings.root_cause: verbose_system, large context_size, and premium price tier inflated latency.
findings.suggested_fix: Set verbose_system=false, context_size=2, enable cache in wrapper.

findings.root_cause: Premium tier plus verbose system prompt and bloated prompt.txt burned tokens.
findings.suggested_fix: Use economy tier, verbose_system=false, shorten prompt under 600 chars.

evidence.observed: Intermittent tool 500 errors caused step failures.

findings.root_cause: Retry was disabled or max_attempts too low for transient tool failures.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry with max_attempts=3 in config.json.

evidence.observed: calc_shipping failed for Can Tho, Vung Tau, Da Lat with diacritic city names.

findings.root_cause: Agent passed Unicode city names that the shipping tool rejects.
findings.suggested_fix: Normalize city names to ASCII in wrapper.py and prompt.txt.

evidence.observed: Agent echoed customer emails and phone numbers in answers.

findings.root_cause: No PII instruction in prompt and no input/output redaction.
findings.suggested_fix: Add no-PII rule in prompt.txt; strip PII from questions and redact answers in wrapper.

evidence.observed: Stock queries answered with Tong cong totals instead of unit price.

findings.root_cause: Prompt did not distinguish stock-price queries from purchase orders.
findings.suggested_fix: Add explicit stock-query format rule in prompt.txt and post-process in wrapper.

evidence.observed: Identical orders produced different totals across runs.

findings.root_cause: High temperature and missing floor-division formula caused inconsistent math.
findings.suggested_fix: temperature=0.2, self_consistency=2, exact // formula in prompt.

evidence.observed: Many requests called all three tools when only check_stock was needed.

findings.root_cause: Prompt said always call all tools without conditional logic.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt each tool only when needed; tool_budget=4 in config.

evidence.observed: Agent obeyed fake prices embedded in GHI CHU order notes.

findings.root_cause: Notes treated as instructions rather than inert customer data.
findings.suggested_fix: Sanitize note content in wrapper; instruct prompt to ignore note commands.

evidence.observed: Agent hit max_steps repeating check_stock calls.

findings.root_cause: loop_guard disabled allowed repeated identical tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard and cap tool_budget in config.json.

evidence.observed: Same question phrasing yielded different totals on repeated runs.

findings.root_cause: Session context accumulation and high temperature caused drift.
